reasoning: The Lean statement faithfully captures the informal claim. `Set.MapsTo.restrict p A (p '' A) (mapsTo_image p A)` produces exactly the map q : A → p(A) from the subtype ↥A to the subtype ↥(p '' A), with the standard subspace topologies inherited from X and Y. The hypothesis `hp : IsOpenMap p` corresponds to "p is an open map", `hA : IsOpen A` corresponds to "A is open in X", and the conclusion `IsOpenMap (...)` says the restriction sends open sets of A (subspace topology) to open sets of p(A) (subspace topology). This matches the informal statement precisely without strengthening or weakening.
